candidate_definition_hints.text: Small configuration management tool for Clojure

FROM clojure:openjdk-11-tools-deps WORKDIR /tmp RUN apt update \ && apt install -y curl make sudo \ && apt-get clean \ && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* \ && mkdir /src COPY Makefile /tmp/Makefile RUN make graalvm WORKDIR /src
